title: micropterum puberulum
intro: Micropterum puberulum, also known as African thyme or false thyme, is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues due to its antimicrobial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, relieving respiratory problems such as coughs and colds, and aiding in wound healing. Micropterum puberulum can be prepared as an infusion, a tincture, or a topical ointment, making it accessible in various herbal preparations for its medicinal uses.
